mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security using an authenticator app or SMS.
mfa.enroll.code_instructions: Enter the verification code sent to your phone.
mfa.enroll.phone_instructions: Enter your phone number in international format. We'll send a verification code by SMS.
mfa.enroll.title: Set up SMS verification
mfa.enroll.totp_instructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (or enter the setup key manually), then enter the 6-digit code it generates.
mfa.error.invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Use international format, e.g. +15551234567.
mfa.error.requires_recent_login: Please sign out and sign in again before changing two-factor settings.
mfa.error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
mfa.reauth.description: For your security, please confirm it's you before changing two-factor settings.
mfa.reauth.title: Confirm it's you
mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
